Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO REAL PROPERTY TAXATION
REPORTED REFERRED TO WAYS AND MEANS

Votes.VoteType: Favorable refer to committee Ways and Means

Title: Allows municipalities to relieve property owners of penalties due to lack of payment if such property owner was a victim of property tax fraud
Summary: Allows municipalities to relieve victims of property tax fraud from penalties arising from lack of payment of property taxes.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the real property tax law, in relation to allowing municipalities to relieve property owners of penalties due to lack of payment if such property owner was a victim of property tax fraud
